props.ChoiceText: When the milk kept turning and the household grew frightened, your charm and handling brought the dairy right again.
props.ChoiceBio: A charm for the milk taught you how close folk magic sits to ordinary hunger.

0.TransitionText: Because a charm for the milk taught you how close folk magic sits to ordinary hunger, village need and fear kept you in cunning work.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Cunning Folk, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a charm for the milk taught you how close folk magic sits to ordinary hunger, village life pulled you back toward earth and necessity.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Farmer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a charm for the milk taught you how close folk magic sits to ordinary hunger, fear or wonder turned you back toward sanctioned devotion.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Religious, but you may remain on your current path instead.
